blocked_moves: any attempt to close the boundary without audit-control assignment
dependency_ledger: Audit-control assignment dependency remains UNRESOLVED. BG-UMA-075 provides four of five required matches; audit-control assignment field is PENDING, not COMPLETED. This creates a hard block on execution.

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Expose any attempt to treat the pending audit-control assignment as optional or to invoke alternative authority to close the boundary without this field.
next_worker_baton.monotonic_preservation: Preserve the open blocker status. Do not allow closure through authority substitution or scope reduction. Maintain exact-match requirement under STD-UMA-075-P.

source_gate_interpretation: Gate passed with zero failures. Worker correctly identified audit-control assignment pending as the open blocker. SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN binding class is accurate per STD-UMA-075-P exact-match requirements. ESCALATE verdict is correct and binding.
